steps.text: Input masking replaces sensitive values with aliases. Example: 'prod-db.internal.net' → 'db_1'. Click a field's 'Mask' button to protect it.
Choose 'mask' (reversible aliases) or 'strip' (remove entirely). Set a prefix like 'db_' to generate 'db_1', 'db_2', etc.
Click 'Add Rule' to save. Test in 'Try It Out' below - the AI sees your alias, not the real value!
